message:
feat(command): HEXPIRE / HPEXPIRE / HEXPIREAT / HPEXPIREAT / HTTL / HPTTL / HEXPIRETIME / HPEXPIRETIME / HPERSIST commands (br-frankenredis-c0z9, rv89 part 2)

Second slice of Redis 7.4 hash field TTL support. Wires the 9 commands
through fr-command's classify_command + dispatch + is_write_command paths
on top of the fr-store primitives landed in br-frankenredis-wwz3 (f700569).

- Command IDs added to the CommandId enum and routed via dispatch.
- Length-indexed classifier entries placed in the correct buckets:
  HTTL(4), HPTTL(5), HEXPIRE(7), HPEXPIRE/HPERSIST(8), HEXPIREAT(9),
  HPEXPIREAT/HEXPIRETIME(10-11), HPEXPIRETIME(12).
- is_write_command now covers HEXPIRE/HPEXPIRE/HEXPIREAT/HPEXPIREAT/HPERSIST.
- Argument parser shared between setters handles [NX|XX|GT|LT] optional
  flag + mandatory FIELDS numfields header with upstream-matching error
  wording ("Parameter `numFields` should be greater than 0" / "... is
  more than number of arguments").
- Negative deadlines surface as "ERR invalid expire time in '<cmd>' command"
  per upstream convention.
- Reply shape: array of integers with upstream codes
  (1 applied, 2 applied-already-expired, 0 condition-blocked,
  -1 no-TTL, -2 missing-field/missing-key).
- WRONGTYPE on a non-hash key surfaces via the shared
  "WRONGTYPE Operation against a key holding the wrong kind of value"
  error string.

10 new tests added covering: ttl-set + httl roundtrip, millisecond form,
absolute seconds + absolute ms forms, past-deadline code 2, complete
NX/XX/GT/LT flag matrix, HTTL/HPTTL code -1 / -2 coverage,
HPERSIST 1/-1/-2 codes, WRONGTYPE surfacing, wrong arity / syntax
error wording. fr-command --lib 619/0. Workspace clippy clean.

Consumers of the command-layer APIs (fr-conformance fixtures, AOF
propagation, keyspace events) land in part 4 (3jrv). Lazy expiry on
hash reads lands in part 3 (b8ut).

Co-Authored-By: cc-redis <noreply@anthropic.com>
